folio.label: 82v
folio.l: Rod for to sompne , an old wyf orrible
Feynyngö a cause , for he wold hire brydle
And happed that he saw , byforn~ hi~ ryde
A gay ©oman , vnder a forest syde
A bowe he bar , and arwes brigút and kene
He had vp on , a courteby of Grene
An hat vp on his hed , with frenges blake
Sire q¶ this sompnour , heyl and wel a take
Welcome q¶ he , and euäy good felawe
Whider ridest æè , vnder this grene wode shawe
Seide this ©oman , wylt æè fer to day
This Sompnour answered , and seide nay
Heere fast by q¶ he , is myn entent
To riden , for to reysen vp , a rent
That longetú to my lordes , duete
A , art thow thanne a bayly , ©e q¶ he
He durst nat for verray velanye , and shame
Sey that he was a Sompnoå / for the name
Depardeux q¶ this ©oman , dere brother
Thow art a Bailly , and I am a nother
I am vnknowen , as in this contree

note.notetxt: 97There is a cross in dry point in the left margin.ODR

folio.l: Of thyn acqueyntaunce , I wold preye the
And eke of brotherhede , if that thow list
I haue gold and siluer , in my chest
If that the happed , to come in to oure shire
Al shal by thyn , rigút as thow wolt desire
Graunt mäcy q¶ this Sompnour , be my feitú
Euäycú in otheres hand , his trouthe leitú
For to be sworn~ bretheren , til that they deye
In daliaunce they reden fortú , and pleye
This Sompnour whicú æ was , as ful of Iangles

note.notetxt: 107There is a cross in dry point in the left margin.ODR

folio.l: As ful of venym ben , theise wariangles
And euäe enqueryngö , vp on euäy thyngö
Brother q¶ he , where is now , ©oure dwellyngö
A nother day , if that I shuld ©ow seche
This ©eman hi~ answered , in softe speche
Brother q¶ he , fer in the Nortú contree
Where as I hope , somtyme I shal the se
Er we departe , I shal the so wel wysse
That of myn hous , ne shalt æè neuäe mysse
Now Brother q¶ this Sompnour , I ©ow preye
Teche me , whil we riden by the weye
Syn that ©e ben , a Bailly , as am I
Som sotiltee , and telle me feitúfully
In myn office , how that I may most wynne
And sparetú nat , for conscience or for Synne
